name: assay
description: /assay — a 14-step ship pipeline orchestrator for Claude Code. Wires together a spec builder, judge panel, risk-tier classifier, MCP router, done-gate, commit protocol, postmortem, and project + session memory into a single command. Includes /spec, /postmortem, /morning, /eod, /weekly, /cross-learn commands and 12 supporting skills. Use to take a fuzzy goal → crisp spec → risk-classified plan → reviewed diff → engineer-in-the-loop commit → captured lessons. Patterns adapted from Anthropic's multi-agent research system (effort budgets, structured delegation briefs, artifact refs, long-horizon hand-off).
